text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As usual, you've summarized all the race
information so succinctly, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(The autumn Tenno Sho is a grand stage with an
illustrious history. The runner of note there is Rob
Roy...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(I was so happy to run with her in the Takarazuka
Kinen. She said I was like a character in a story
and taught me that I can make an impact on
others.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Then there's the Queen Elizabeth II Cup, which I
ran in last year. My key competition there is
Groove.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(I have fond memories of the race itself... but
more importantly, Groove said she wanted to
race me again. I'd like to make that happen!)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(The Mile Championship will be a challenge, but
it should be an entertaining race in the end. The
one I should look out for there is Kawakami.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(Kawakami taught me the fervor of victory and
defeat. It'd be nice to compete against a
Japanese-style princess again...)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(And finally, there's the Arima Kinen. It's a
long-distance race, which means it'd be rather
demanding, but it would give me a chance to
show my gratitude to the fans.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
(As for the notable runners... First up, there's
Scarlet. I put on a poor showing last time we
faced off, so I'd like to show her what I can really
do.)

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: (And then there's...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Other racers of note: My BFF Air Shakur." The
hell're you writing now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha... So you're trying to decide on your final
race. How poetic.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I have to make this decision with great care. I
must steel my heart and prepare an appropriate
finale for my fans and friends.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Steel your heart, huh? Hah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Why are you laughing? I'm taking this very
seriously!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You never learn, do you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're having trouble choosing because you want
to race everyone while you're in peak form, right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Then let someone else mull over it for you. Or do
you think you're the only one "steeling your
heart"?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I see... I guess I could ask Trainer, huh?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Your trainer would be so hurt to hear you say
that.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
No, I didn't mean anything bad by it... Hey!
Shakur! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hey! You have something you want to tell me,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...I just came to tell you to run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I race against you now, I'm bound to get some
useful data.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're clearly different from the others. You're
the one I want to crush.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But it wouldn't be fair after what I heard you say
before. So I changed my mind.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It's not like you to worry about things being fair,
Shakur!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You really think you can say whatever you want
as long as you dress it up in pretty words, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I was only joking. I know you're very noble.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
You know, I get the feeling that there was
something else you wanted to tell me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Do I still need to give you an excuse to speak
your mind even now?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Even if you don't enter the Arima Kinen, make
sure you come and watch.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This will be my "finale" too. I'll keep struggling
until the end.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: What?! Shakur, what are you—

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just come! You better be there, Fine... I'm going
to pulverize that so-called resolve of yours.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Shakur...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
We all have different feelings and our own
circumstances. As for me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before training begins, Fine Motion asks me to
choose her next race for her.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'll be completely honest with you—I can't decide!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But if we really have to choose, then I'd like you
to do it.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I want to entrust this decision to you. Is that
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion's final race should be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! Let's finish things by starting a
brand new story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! I'll live on in everyone's hearts as
queen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now The Mile Championship.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! I'll be sure to unleash my fighting
spirit right till the very end!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Goal Race is now the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay, got it! Let's bring everything to its
conclusion!
